task_objective: Rename the local checkout directory to SDH-ludusavi and update pre-commit validation before committing.
design_decisions: Use the exact project name SDH-ludusavi for the local checkout directory.
Keep .git/hooks/pre-commit aligned with the current project checks.
Add scripts/pre_commit.sh as the tracked source for the hook behavior.
results: Updated the local pre-commit hook to run through ./run.sh and type-check py_modules/sdh_ludusavi/.
Added tracked tests for the pre-commit command contract.
